Event: Royal Challenge - Season 38
Event Date: 01/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A225
Threads of Memory

Triggers: 3 sec

Life-Saving Barrier
The artifact owner and 2 random allies gain a shield that blocks 70% of any damage for 4 sec.
If a shielded unit dies, they are revived with 40% health, and their physical and magic armor are increased by 35% for 4 sec.
When the shield runs out, the previously shielded unit becomes immune to movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrifaction, jelly, and fear, and they gain restoration. A random negative effect is removed from them, and they recover 350000 health. It also increases their damage by 35% and health by 35% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
